description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this black shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. The bag is large enough to accomodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get apprecaitive glances all day long. The versatile bag looks as great with casual outfits as it does with your formal wear. Time to take the office by storm, and be the coolest chick at the mall too! Made of leather for enhanced durability and style Two roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket and small pouch to hold essentials Small zippered compartment at the back for stowing essentials Contrast thread detailing for added attraction Two short handles for ease of carrying Fixed buckled straps at the sides with stud detailing for increased style Metallic embellishment at the end of the straps and stud detailing on the straps for added attraction Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Bag care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleaner
